scripts.test: pnpm run test:fast && pnpm run test:agents
scripts.test:agents: vitest run --retry=1 --testTimeout=600000 test/workers-api.test.ts && vitest run --retry=1 --testTimeout=600000 test/planning-api.test.ts && vitest run --retry=1 --testTimeout=600000 test/build-api.test.ts && vitest run --retry=1 --testTimeout=600000 test/scan-api.test.ts && vitest run --retry=1 --testTimeout=600000 test/task-api.test.ts
